_doc: Typecheck-only config. module=ESNext + moduleResolution=bundler matches existing src/ imports and vitest/vite toolchain. Wave 1.x will migrate src/ to NodeNext-compatible imports (esp. Ajv default-import: change `import Ajv from 'ajv'` → `import * as AjvNs from 'ajv'; const Ajv = AjvNs.default;` or use named imports). Once src/ is NodeNext-clean, unify with tsconfig.build.json. See holding/plans/native-v1.x/PLAN.md Wave 1.x TODO.
